shots.title: FIXED-WORLD Camera A — Over Bike B Toward Character A on Bike A — 2026-06-17 00:44 PT
shots.note: CURRENT REVIEW LOCK CANDIDATE. Fixed-world map: Character B stays on Bike B, the left/near bike; Character A stays on Bike A, the right/far bike. Camera A is over Character B's blurred blonde shoulder/hair toward Character A. The women do not switch bikes, seats, sides, or places; only the camera angle changes. Same brunette face, ponytail, dark mocha/taupe luxury athleisure, same blonde foreground wardrobe accent, same gym layout. Wider framing shows lower legs and bike mechanics so both riders can visibly pedal in video while the active speaker's mouth remains clear for lip sync.
